mode.description: tools_standalone: no Caddy/Keycloak; single tools container on tool_port (see deployments/local-tools-127).

tool_port.description: Host port for tools_standalone (published to recon-lab:8080).

attach_networks.description: Optional external Docker networks to attach (e.g. wc-local-ports-127-net) so the tool can reach default-html:8080 by service name.

host_gateway.description: If true, add extra_hosts host.docker.internal:host-gateway for tools_standalone.

service_ports.description: For local_ports: logical service name → host port (Caddy publishes one listener per port).

html_hosts.description: For vm_host: hostnames for default-html (no wildcards)
